violations.text: Facility is lacking an allergen statement. Allergen statement to be posted before opening. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025
